case_title: SF WESTGATE APARTMENTS, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. FRANCESCA ZUMBO et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SF WESTGATE APARTMENTS, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZUMBO, FRANCESCA AN INDIVIDUAL QUINN, JENNIFER AN INDIVIDUAL EUSEBIO, ROBIN AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1007 HAIGHT STREET, UNIT NUMBER 7, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94117, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO SERVED BY MAIL AND PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SF WESTGATE APARTMENTS, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SERVED OCT-21-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT EUSEBIO, ROBIN AN INDIVIDUAL

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO SERVED BY MAIL AND PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SF WESTGATE APARTMENTS, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SERVED OCT-21-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ZUMBO, FRANCESCA AN INDIVIDUAL

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SF WESTGATE APARTMENTS, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SERVED OCT-18-2011, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF DAVID P. WASSERMAN, ESQ. RE COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SF WESTGATE APARTMENTS, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT ZUMBO, FRANCESCA AN INDIVIDUAL QUINN, JENNIFER AN INDIVIDUAL EUSEBIO, ROBIN AN INDIVIDUAL

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SF WESTGATE APARTMENTS, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT ZUMBO, FRANCESCA AN INDIVIDUAL QUINN, JENNIFER AN INDIVIDUAL EUSEBIO, ROBIN AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
